{| class="article-table" style="width: 100%;"
! colspan="2" style="text-align: center;" |Antagonistas
|- style="border-top: 2px #b38600 solid"
|[[Parte 1]]
|[[Lyra Rundovar]]
|-
|[[Parte 2]]
|[[Soldados da Noite]]
|-
|[[Parte 3]]
|[[V'doriak]]
|-
|[[Parte 4]]
|[[Lady Bruma]] • [[Lord Fafnir]]
|-
|[[Parte 5]]
|[[Forgio]]
|-
|[[Parte 6]]
|[[Delver]]
|-
|[[Parte 7]]
|
|-
|[[Parte 8]]
|
|-
|[[Parte 9]]
|[[Os Fantasmas]]
|}
